My UPS package went "Out for Delivery" at 7:45 AM. IS IT HERE YET? IS IT HERE YET?

Gonna go spend some more time in the woods.

90% chance of rain today. Cool.

Awake. Stomach hurts. Wanting to go back to sleep so that I don't have to wait for UPS.
